title: Move with purpose.Live with harmony
text:
Move with purpose.Live with harmony
Learn Aikido for conflict resolution, self-defense, and personal growth — on and off the mat.


  
  
    Welcome to Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin
    
      Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit
      organization dedicated to sharing and promoting the art of Aikido in
      Janesville, Wisconsin. As part of the
      Capital Aikido Federation,
      we welcome people from all backgrounds who seek personal growth through
      this peaceful and dynamic martial art.
    
    
      Our training emphasizes de-escalation and resolving conflict without harm.
      Under the guidance of Lares sensei, we provide a welcoming, inclusive
      space where students build confidence, enhance physical skills, and
      cultivate a mindset rooted in harmony and respect — on and off the mat.
    
    
      Aikido is more than self-defense — it's a practice that fosters awareness,
      empathy, and resilience. We invite you to visit the dojo, watch a class,
      or step onto the mat for a free introductory session.
    
    Learn More
  



  
  
  
  





  

    
      Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin
      
        A dojo dedicated to the practice and promotion of the Japanese Martial
        Art of Aikido. We are a 501(c)(3) nonprofit affiliated with the
        Capital Aikido Federation.
      
      
        Capital Aikikai of Wisconsin was able to open its doors thanks to a
        generous donation from the
        Ikigai Foundation. The Ikigai Foundation supports work
        that fosters joy, purpose, and meaning — values at the heart of Aikido.
        We're proud to continue this vision by offering a space for all to grow
        and connect through practice.
      
    

    
      Location
      
        4712 S John Paul Rd
        Milton, WI 53563
      
    

    
      Contact
      
        info@aikidofwisconsin.com
        (608) 618-3004
